title: 心愛溶けるビターチョコレート 1話 あの日の真実

script.text: はぁ、はぁ……

translations.en: Haa‚ haa…

script.text: 今夜のライブ、大成功でしたーっ！

translations.en: Tonight's live was a great success!

script.text: うん、ファンとの一体感が凄かったよね！

translations.en: Yeah‚ the unity with the fans was amazing!

script.text: 今回は特に、私達へのコールも沢山あったし

translations.en: Especially this time‚ there were a lot of calls for us.

script.text: 当然だよ！　こころと愛はとっくに

translations.en: Of course! Kokoro and Ai have long been…

script.text: LizNoirの立派なメンバーなんだから～

translations.en: …valuable members of LizNoir~

script.text: 特にこころは、すでに事実上のセンター！

translations.en: Especially Kokoro‚ she's practically the center!

script.text: と言っても過言じゃないしね

translations.en: It's not an exaggeration to say that.

script.text: 新生LizNoirは

translations.en: The new LizNoir…

script.text: 私、赤崎こころが引っ張ります！

translations.en: …will be led by me‚ Kokoro Akasaki!

script.text: またこころは調子に乗って……

translations.en: Kokoro‚ you're getting carried away…

script.text: 歌もダンスもまだまだ先輩達にはかなわないよ

translations.en: Your singing and dancing still can't match the senpais.

script.text: 愛、そんな弱気じゃ、いつまで経っても

translations.en: Ai‚ with such a timid attitude‚ you'll never catch up to the senpais.

script.text: 先輩達には追い付けないよ？

translations.en: You know that‚ right?

script.text: 私はとてもそんな強気にはなれないなあ……

translations.en: I can't be as confident as you…

script.text: 仕方ないな～。じゃあ、今後のリズノワについての

translations.en: I guess that can't be helped. How about we have a celebration?

script.text: 作戦会議も兼ねて、打ち上げしない？

translations.en: It can also serve as a strategy meeting for LizNoir's future.

script.text: あっ、いいね！　先輩達も誘って、楽しくやろうよ

translations.en: Ah‚ sounds good! Let's invite the senpais too and have fun.

script.text: じゃ、こころが二人に声を掛けて来るから

translations.en: Alright‚ I'll go talk to the two of them.

script.text: 愛はここで待っててね

translations.en: Ai‚ wait here.

script.text: 愛が失言して莉央さんを怒らせるといけないから～

translations.en: We don't want you to say something wrong and make Rio-san angry~

script.text: ……いつも失言してるのはこころの方でしょ

translations.en: …Isn't it usually you who says something wrong‚ Kokoro?

script.text: 先輩達は楽屋に……うん、戻ってきてるみたい

translations.en: The senpais are in the dressing room… Hmm‚ looks like they've returned.

script.text: ……ん？　何か真剣な声で話してるような……

translations.en: …Huh? It sounds like they're having a serious conversation…

script.text: 葵！　ライブ中、一度転びかけたでしょ！？

translations.en: Aoi! During the live‚ you almost stumbled‚ right?

script.text: 怪我してるんじゃない？

translations.en: Are you injured?

script.text: 違うよ。シューズの底がすり減って滑っただけ

translations.en: No‚ it's not like that. The soles of my shoes were worn out‚ so I slipped.

script.text: とっさにカバーしたのに……莉央は目ざといね

translations.en: I covered it up quickly… Rio‚ you're observant‚ aren't you?

script.text: ……私、自分のことで精一杯で、気付きもしなかった

translations.en: …I was so preoccupied with myself that I didn't even notice.

script.text: お客さんも気付いていないはず……莉央さん凄い……

translations.en: The audience shouldn't have noticed either… Rio-san is amazing…

script.text: ……本当に怪我じゃないのね？　葵

translations.en: …So it really wasn't an injury‚ Aoi?

script.text: ホントだってば、莉央は心配性だな

translations.en: I'm telling you‚ it's true. Rio‚ you worry too much.

script.text: ほら、よく見て。なんともないから

translations.en: Look closely. I'm perfectly fine.

script.text: 良かった……。でも心配もするわ

translations.en: I'm relieved… But I still worry.

script.text: 貴方には“前科”があるんだから。忘れたの？

translations.en: You do have a "Ex-con‚" you know. Did you forget?

script.text: え？　前科？

translations.en: Eh? Ex-con?

script.text: むぎゃあっ！？

translations.en: Gyaa!

script.text: きゃあっ！？

translations.en: Kyaa!

script.text: 莉央！　危ないっ！

translations.en: Rio! It's dangerous!

script.text: 大丈夫？

translations.en: Are you okay?

script.text: それに君も

translations.en: And you too.

script.text: 僕らがまだ二人だった頃の話じゃないか

translations.en: Isn't this a story from when it was just the two of us?

script.text: よく覚えてたね、莉央

translations.en: You remembered it well‚ Rio.

script.text: もう！　当たり前でしょ！！

translations.en: Geez! Of course‚ I remember!!

script.text: ……あんなことはこりごりよ

translations.en: …I'm so done with that kind of thing.

script.text: ……あの時、葵さんが、怪我を……？

translations.en: …At that time‚ Aoi-san‚ you got injured…?

script.text: ……わ、私……なんてことを……

translations.en: …M-me… What have I done…

script.text: ……もしかして、グランプリでリズノワが負けたのって

translations.en: …Could it be that LizNoir lost in the Grand Prix because of that?

script.text: こころーっ！

translations.en: Kokoro!

script.text: 遅いよ、待ちきれないから来ちゃったよ

translations.en: You're late‚ I couldn't wait so I came here.

script.text: ……？　こころ？　どうしたの？

translations.en: …? Kokoro? What's wrong?

script.text: ごめん、こころは急に用事が出来ちゃいました！

translations.en: Sorry‚ something came up suddenly for me!

script.text: ……打ち上げは三人でやって！　ではっ！

translations.en: …Do the celebration without me‚ the three of you! Bye!

script.text: え？　ちょっ、ちょっと待ってよ、こころ！

translations.en: Eh? Wait‚ Kokoro‚ wait a moment!

script.text: 行っちゃった……も～！！

translations.en: She left… Ugh!!

script.text: こら、廊下で騒いじゃダメよ

translations.en: Hey‚ don't make a ruckus in the hallway.

script.text: 早く中に入りなさい

translations.en: Hurry and come inside.

script.text: あれ？　愛、一人？

translations.en: Huh? Ai‚ alone?

script.text: はい。こころも今の今までいたんですけど

translations.en: Yes. Kokoro was here until just now‚

script.text: 急用が出来たって、走ってどこか行っちゃいました

translations.en: but she suddenly had something important to do and ran off somewhere.

script.text: 急用？　何かしら？

translations.en: Something important? I wonder what it is?

script.text: この後、一緒に打ち上げしようと思っていたのに

translations.en: We were planning to celebrate together afterwards.
(…Don't tell me…)

script.text: ――翌日

translations.en: ―― The next day

script.text: ……こころ？　ねえ、こころ、どうしたの？

translations.en: …Kokoro? Hey‚ Kokoro‚ what's wrong?

script.text: ――えっ？　な、何？

translations.en: Eh? W-What?

script.text: 何って

translations.en: What do you mean by what?

script.text: 今朝からずっとため息ばっかりついてるじゃない

translations.en: You've been sighing all day since this morning.

script.text: そうよ、顔色も良くないわ

translations.en: That's right‚ your complexion doesn't look good either.

script.text: 何かあったのなら、私達に話しなさい

translations.en: If something happened‚ tell us.

script.text: ねえ、こころ

translations.en: Hey‚ Kokoro.

script.text: もしかして、昨日――

translations.en: Could it be‚ yesterday――

script.text: い、いえいえ！　こころは全然元気ですよ～

translations.en: N-No‚ no! Kokoro is totally fine~!

script.text: 昨日のライブの興奮が抜けなくて、少し寝不足なだけで

translations.en: I just can't calm down from the excitement of yesterday's live‚ so I'm a little sleep-deprived‚ that's all.

script.text: ほら、見て下さい！

translations.en: Look‚ see!

script.text: このきらきらアイドルスマイルを！

translations.en: This sparkling idol smile!

script.text: いつものわざとらしさがない

translations.en: It lacks the usual artificialness.

script.text: やっぱり、おかしいな

translations.en: Something is definitely off.

script.text: そうね、普段はもっとイラっとするくらい

translations.en: That's right‚ it's usually more irritating.

script.text: 媚び媚びの笑顔だわ

translations.en: It's a sycophantic smile.

script.text: イラっとするってなんですか～っ！？

translations.en: What do you mean by irritating!?

script.text: さらっと酷いことを言わないで下さい～っ！

translations.en: Don't casually say mean things!

script.text: ふふ、やっと元気が出てきたわね

translations.en: Hehe‚ you finally seem to be feeling better.

script.text: じゃあ、次の仕事の話をしましょうか

translations.en: Well then‚ shall we talk about the next job?

script.text: それって、毎年沢山の事務所からアイドルが出る

translations.en: That's the Valentine's event where many idols from

script.text: バレンタインのイベントですよね？

translations.en: various agencies participate every year‚ right?

script.text: いつも断ってたやつ？　正直、僕はあまり興味ないな

translations.en: The one we always declined? Honestly‚ I'm not very interested.

script.text: 甘いチョコのイメージは僕らになじまないと思うし

translations.en: I don't think the image of sweet chocolate suits us.

script.text: そうね、大きなイベントではあるけど……

translations.en: That's right‚ it's a big event‚ but…

script.text: 私達らしさをなくしてまで出演することはないかしら

translations.en: I wonder if it's worth participating if we have to lose our uniqueness.

script.text: そ……そうですね、私達の楽曲は

translations.en: Y-Yeah‚ our songs…

script.text: バレンタインっぽいもの、ないですし

translations.en: We don't have anything that's Valentine-like.

script.text: ちょっと残念ですけど

translations.en: Even it's a bit disappointing‚

script.text: このお仕事はなしということで――

translations.en: let's decline this job――

script.text: 待って下さい！　このイベントには他の事務所から

translations.en: Wait a moment! In this event‚ there are other rival groups

script.text: ライバルグループも沢山出演するじゃないですか

translations.en: from different agencies participating‚ right?

script.text: 出演を辞退したら、逃げたみたいに見られちゃいます

translations.en: If we decline the offer‚ it will seem like we're running away.

script.text: こころは、リズノワがそんな風に思われるのは嫌です

translations.en: Kokoro doesn't want LizNoir to be seen that way.

script.text: ――こころ？

translations.en: ――Kokoro?

script.text: それに、せっかくのチャンスをみすみす逃すなんて

translations.en: Besides‚ to let this opportunity slip away

script.text: もったいないんじゃありませんか！

translations.en: ‚ isn't it a waste?

script.text: こころの意見も一理あるけど……愛も言ったでしょ？

translations.en: Kokoro's opinion has a point‚ but… Didn't Ai say it too?

script.text: バレンタイン曲が、今の私達にはないのよ

translations.en: We don't have a Valentine's song that suits us right now.

script.text: うーん……バレンタインってよく分からないしなぁ

translations.en: Hmm… I don't really understand Valentine's anyway.

script.text: 僕、毎年もらってばかりだから……

translations.en: I've always been the one receiving it every year…

script.text: それなら、こころがLizNoirらしい

translations.en: In that case‚ Kokoro will show a LizNoir-like…

script.text: バレンタイン曲を企画してみせます～

translations.en: Valentine's song!

script.text: そんな曲があれば、私達のファン層も広がりますよ？

translations.en: If we have such a song‚ our fan base will expand‚ right?

script.text: アイドルの頂点に、また一歩前進です！

translations.en: It's another step forward towards the pinnacle of idols!

script.text: ……こころがそこまで言うなら、僕は反対しないよ

translations.en: …If Kokoro says so‚ I won't object.

script.text: ……分かったわ。でも時間はあまりないわよ

translations.en: …Understood. But we don't have much time.

script.text: それにステージで歌う以上、一切妥協はしない

translations.en: And if we're going to sing on stage‚ we won't compromise at all.

script.text: 出来が悪ければ不採用。それでもやるのね？

translations.en: If it's not good enough‚ we won't be chosen. Are you still going to do it?

script.text: はい！　ビッグシップに乗ったつもりで

translations.en: Yes! Just think you all on a big ship.

script.text: お待ちくださ～～い！

translations.en: and wait for my sailing~!

script.text: 分かったわ、{user}さんには

translations.en: Understood. I'll ask {user}-san

script.text: 出演の返事は待ってくれるよう伝えておく

translations.en: to let them wait for our response regarding the event.

script.text: （……なんだろう、いつも前向きなこころだけど）

translations.en: (…I wonder what's wrong. Kokoro is usually so positive.)

script.text: （今回は少し違う気がする……）

translations.en: (This time‚ it feels a bit different…)
